narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 5-D (precinct in Scioto County) has 416 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
